description: Defines the LoanApplicationDraft entity class representing a draft of a loan application, including metadata, status, scoring, and timestamps for persistence in a database.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a draft of a loan application with various status and metadata fields, mapped to the 'loan_application_draft' table.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID ID of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID ID of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with this draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload string representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload string representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON string representing section statuses.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the JSON string representing section statuses.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the current status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the computed risk score.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable decision reason.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the human-readable decision reason.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the application was evaluated by risk engine.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the application was evaluated.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was submitted.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the draft was submitted.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the optimistic concurrency version.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the optimistic concurrency version.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last updated timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last updated timestamp.
